description: Create a Level 0 (Context) Data Flow Diagram for an 'Online Order Processing System' in EdrawMax. The diagram must feature a central process labeled 'Online Order Processing System' connected to four external entities: 'Customer', 'Payment Gateway', 'Inventory Database', and 'Shipping Provider'. Include the following labeled data flows: 'Order Request' (Customer to Central), 'Order Confirmation' (Central to Customer), 'Payment Details' (Central to Payment Gateway), 'Payment Status' (Payment Gateway to Central), 'Stock Query' (Central to Inventory Database), 'Stock Availability' (Inventory Database to Central), 'Shipping Request' (Central to Shipping Provider), and 'Tracking Number' (Shipping Provider to Central). Save the project to /home/ga/Diagrams/dfd_context_diagram.eddx and export the diagram as an image to /home/ga/Diagrams/dfd_context_diagram.png.
